install_cmds: pip install openai httpx tenacity termcolor fastapi uvicorn requests tqdm pyyaml pyarrow slowapi 'huggingface_hub[cli]' psutil transformers accelerate sentencepiece
cd server && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ..

data_deps.name: stabletoolbench-server-data
data_deps.description: StableToolBench server_data cache (tools/ + answer/) extracted from the HF dataset stabletoolbench/Cache; bound into the container at /data/stabletoolbench/server_data (TOOL_SERVER_DATA_DIR). Prepared on the host because install_cmds run inside the build container, where {data_root} is not expanded and not host-writable.
